description.p: Todolet is a to-do app for the terminal, a companion to the todolet.app web app: see the week ahead, add tasks to a day, tick them off. No accounts, no cloud, no dependencies.

Alongside the interactive interface there are commands to quick-add a task, print a week, export a week as iCal, and back up or restore your tasks. Tasks live in a local JSON file in the same format as the web app's backups, so data moves freely between phone and terminal.
